modules.name: contracts
modules.description: Frozen pydantic v2 models: CanonicalTransaction, FinancialProfile stub.
modules.notes: FinancialProfile builder deferred to later prompt.

modules.name: inventory
modules.description: Detect file type, bank, layout, text-layer presence.

modules.name: parser
modules.description: Universal parser: tabular, native PDF, scanned PDF.
modules.notes: Native PDF: uniquify columns + coalesce camelot frames before concat (avoids InvalidIndexError on duplicate blank headers).

modules.name: schema_detection
modules.notes: Reads config/column_synonyms.yaml via minimal in-repo YAML loader.

modules.name: normalize
modules.notes: Handles signed-amount split and payment_mode inference.

modules.name: merchant
modules.description: Extract merchant/payment_mode; hybrid rules+sklearn categorization; defensive live enrichment.
modules.notes: Rules from config/*.yaml. Tier2 char-ngram TFIDF+LogisticRegression (joblib). Tier3 LLM (Groq) OFF by default. Enrichment request-path is cache-read-only; enrich-batch CLI does bulk network.

modules.name: behaviour
modules.notes: Salary detection, cashflow, ratios, balance/txn stats, cadence clustering. Handles short histories/missing balances.

modules.name: profile
modules.notes: Maps behaviour + recurring into frozen FinancialProfile; extended detail in expected_cashflow.

modules.name: features
modules.description: Deterministic underwriting feature table (one row per customer).
modules.notes: Documented FEATURE_COLUMNS; no torch. This is the ML feature table.

modules.name: synthetic
modules.notes: Import-time torch/sdv guard; requirements-ml.txt only. Never importable on the web dyno. Smoke test skipped locally (ML stack not installed).

modules.name: persistence
modules.description: SQLAlchemy 2.0 + Alembic; enrichment cache/queue, LLM cache, transactions, profiles, features, synthetic registry; DuckDB analytics.
modules.notes: DATABASE_URL default sqlite:///local.db, Postgres via psycopg for deploy. Alembic migration 0001 creates all tables.

modules.name: api
modules.description: Lightweight FastAPI service (health, statements, transactions, profile, features, synthetic).
modules.notes: Upload cap default 50 MB; 413 detail reports MB. Health exposes max_upload_mb. Temp cleanup swallows WinError 32. HTTPException not masked by catch-all handler.

modules.name: web_ui
modules.description: Browser dashboard: statement upload, transaction ledger, profile and feature panels.
modules.notes: Brand FinUnderWrite with Newsreader/Outfit, ledger atmosphere, and workspace reveal motion. Dropzone shows max upload MB from /health.

decisions.choice: Two frozen contracts (CanonicalTransaction, FinancialProfile) as the module boundary.
src-layout package with setuptools; minimal in-repo YAML loader (no PyYAML dependency).
decisions.rationale: Stay within listed dependencies; config files remain YAML for human editing.

decisions.choice: Synthetic PDF fixtures generated via pure-Python PDF writer and blank-page PDF for scanned case.
decisions.rationale: Avoid unlisted reportlab; keep fixtures commit-safe.

decisions.choice: Adopt PyYAML for config parsing; yaml_loader now wraps yaml.safe_load. Supersedes ADR-002.
decisions.rationale: Merchant rules and category map require nested list-of-dicts the minimal loader could not parse; httpx/tenacity were already being added, so a robust YAML parser is warranted.

decisions.choice: Hybrid categorizer (rules -> char-ngram TFIDF+LogisticRegression -> optional LLM). LLM Tier 3 OFF by default. Enrichment request-path is cache-read-only; bulk network only in enrich-batch.
decisions.rationale: Deterministic, torch-free, and privacy-preserving by default; enrichment never blocks or fails categorization.

decisions.choice: Split dependencies: lightweight requirements.txt for the web/serving runtime (no torch/sdv/sentence-transformers/spacy) and requirements-ml.txt for the offline ML stack.
decisions.rationale: Keeps the Render web dyno within a 512 MB budget and torch-free; heavy ML is offline-only.

decisions.choice: BehaviourSummary and RecurringItem are internal (non-contract) pydantic types; profile builder maps them into the frozen FinancialProfile, carrying extended detail in expected_cashflow. Pure pandas/numpy, deterministic.
decisions.rationale: Adds analytics without changing the frozen contracts (no canonical_schema_version bump).

decisions.choice: Synthetic generation is offline-only with an import-time torch/sdv guard. SDV is BUSL-licensed (verify terms before commercial use); SynthCity (Apache-2.0) is the benchmarked alternative.
decisions.rationale: Prevents the ML stack from ever loading on the web dyno and flags the licensing constraint.

decisions.choice: Alembic migrations with DATABASE_URL (sqlite:///local.db dev, Postgres via psycopg for deploy); DuckDB as a read-only local analytics layer.
decisions.rationale: External managed Postgres survives Render's ephemeral filesystem; DuckDB gives local analytics without touching the operational store.

decisions.choice: Serve a static HTML/CSS/JS dashboard from FastAPI (/ and /static) instead of a separate Node frontend.
decisions.rationale: Keeps the Render image single-process and torch-free; UI talks to existing JSON endpoints without a build step.

decisions.choice: Default max_upload_bytes = 50 MB; user-facing oversize errors and /health report the threshold in MB.
decisions.rationale: Common multi-page bank PDFs are ~30 MB; byte thresholds are opaque in the UI.

next_actions: Install requirements-ml.txt offline and run 'finunderwrite synth-generate' to populate + register datasets
Push to GitHub, set FINUNDERWRITE_DATABASE_URL to external Postgres, deploy via render.yaml
Future prompts: risk scoring, fraud detection, RAG
